title: ANC - 6.-ANC is OFF and Transparency is OFF, both without selected values
scenario: ANC and Transparency modes remain OFF and Transparency is greyed out during a call when both were previously disabled, with a popup stating the option is unavailable
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home screen and tap on the connected Poly Bluetooth audio device.
3. Go to Device Settings → Audio Settings.
4. Ensure ANC Mode is set to OFF (no value selected).
5. Ensure Transparency Mode is set to OFF (no value selected).
6. Start or join a call (via Zoom, Microsoft Teams, or native Mobile network call).
7. During the active call, observe the ANC Mode status.
8. During the active call, observe the Transparency Mode toggle.
9. Tap the Transparency Mode toggle during the call.
12. After the call ends, observe the state of both ANC Mode and Transparency Mode.
13. Attempt to toggle between ANC Mode and Transparency Mode.
expected: 1. ANC Mode remains OFF during the call. 2. Transparency Mode is greyed out/inaccessible during the call. 3. Tapping the Transparency Mode toggle during the call shows a popup informing the user the option is not available during a call. 4. After leaving the call, both ANC Mode and Transparency Mode remain OFF. 5. The user can toggle between ANC Mode and Transparency Mode normally after the call ends.
